funFacts: Coloring anime pages provides teens and young artists with high-contrast, modern pop culture drawings.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing contrasting color schemes using high-resolution colored pencils.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
